## tscli set dns searchpaths

Set (replace) DNS search-paths for the tailnet

```
tscli set dns searchpaths [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help                 help for searchpaths
  -s, --searchpath strings   DNS search domain (repeatable). Use an empty value to clear, e.g. --searchpath ""
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
  -k, --api-key string   Tailscale API key
  -d, --debug            Dump HTTP requests/responses
  -o, --output string    Output: [human json pretty yaml]
  -n, --tailnet string   Tailscale tailnet (default "-")
```

### SEE ALSO

* [tscli set dns](tscli_set_dns.md)	 - Set DNS information
